# Tag Taxonomy

## Rules

- List tags as an inline array in the frontmatter `tags` field: `tags: [tag1, tag2]`
- Maximum 3 per file
- Lowercase kebab-case
- **Tags are for topic discrimination only**. Entity references (projects/people/organizations) are managed via the `mentions` field
- Choose from the approved tags below. If no existing tag fits, create a new one and add it to this file
- **Refer to the tag description (desc)** to select tags that match the definition

## Topic Tags

| Tag | Description | Aliases | Added |
|-----|-------------|---------|-------|
| api-design | API, interface, and protocol design | api | 2026-01-01 |
| infrastructure | Infrastructure, deployment, CI/CD, and storage design | infra, devops | 2026-01-01 |
| pricing | Pricing, pricing strategy, and cost justification | cost, price | 2026-01-01 |
| monetization | Revenue models, billing structures, freemium, and subscription design | revenue-model, business-model | 2026-01-01 |
| market-analysis | Market analysis, competitive landscape, and business model analysis | market, competitive-analysis | 2026-01-01 |
| product-design-strategy | Rationale for feature design, differentiation points, connecting technical choices to business value | feature-strategy | 2026-01-01 |
| platform-strategy | Platform selection and build/buy decisions | platform-choice | 2026-01-01 |
| sales-execution | Sales activities and customer acquisition operations | sales, outreach | 2026-01-01 |
| content-marketing | Content marketing, blogging, and SEO | blog, seo | 2026-01-01 |
| workflow-design | Task management, workflow, and project definition design patterns | | 2026-01-01 |
